title: tasks.md (plan/sub-plan) runtime body-structure contract
description: Hook-consumable runtime artifact for plan-tree tasks.md files. Ledger-at-top + per-task-at-bottom shape per Stream B research; R-37 lockstep with manifest.tasks[] per Plan 81 SP13 Session 2 A23. Authored by SP14 Batch A T-13.3 (2026-05-18).

_design_notes.consumer: hooks/tasks-md-autosync.sh + librarian plan-index + manifest auto-sync sentinels (<!-- task-done: NN/T-M -->)

structure_rationale: Cache at top (current ledger / status table) for quick scan; recency at bottom (current task expanded) for context-load — Stream B research (file shapes optimized for LLM consumption).
lockstep_rule: R-37 — adding/removing a task ID requires same-commit update to manifest.tasks[]; status flip syncs via <!-- task-done: NN/T-M --> sentinels per feedback_tasks_md_autosync.
task_id_format: T-N where N is monotonically increasing integer within the plan/sub-plan
